reconstructed_flow: Frame a situation, identify relevant factors, sort them into types, and judge which categories matter most
notes: Recognizable as a situational assessment but not uniquely branded

reconstructed_flow: State a problem, inspect the event, extend a causal chain, and stop when a plausible explanation appears adequately confirmed
Sense a changing situation, interpret it, choose a response, act, then revisit the judgment as conditions change
Notice a phenomenon, propose an explanation, test it, interpret results, and revise the explanation
Define a system, list possible failures, understand their effects or causes, judge risk, rank what matters most, and act on the highest concerns
Study users, define the problem, generate ideas, build something, test it, and iterate
Set a short-term goal, order work, commit to a subset, execute, review what happened, and adjust the next cycle
notes: Recognizable as iterative work management but not uniquely Scrum

reconstructed_flow: Organize tasks into levels of cognitive complexity and choose an intended level of challenge
notes: Sequence lost that the artifact is largely a reference hierarchy rather than a procedural method

reconstructed_flow: Sense a context, place it into a domain, interpret what the domain implies, choose a response pattern, and revisit placement if the context shifts
Frame an organization, map major components, propose relationships or choices, judge fit, and communicate the overall model
notes: Sequence flattened a representational planning canvas into generic model construction

reconstructed_flow: Gather findings, frame the case, generate possible explanations, judge their fit, choose a next step, test the leading explanation, and update as evidence changes
Set incident objectives, assess the situation, organize roles, communicate the plan, choose tactics, act, and revise as the incident evolves
Define an improvement target, plan a change, implement it, check results, learn from the outcome, and adjust the next round
Define a problem, gather evidence, build a causal account, test the likely cause, choose a correction, and implement it
Frame a choice, list options, compare them against criteria, judge the fit, choose one, and explain the choice
Define a target outcome, explain a pathway to it, organize intermediate steps, make assumptions explicit, specify what to test later, and communicate the model
notes: Recognizable as causal planning but somewhat compressed

reconstructed_flow: Describe what happened, explain differences, extract lessons, decide changes, and share them
Define a system, inspect components, sort possible threats, interpret applicability, judge severity, and choose mitigations
Have an experience, observe it, reflect on it, form a concept, and revisit understanding through the next experiment
notes: Learning cycle survived but active experimentation was compressed

reconstructed_flow: Set strategic objectives, produce initiatives, rank them, align commitments, execute, review progress, and adjust
notes: Sequence pointed to strategic deployment generally but did not uniquely recover the branded method
